Table of Contents

Interface ITinSelection

Namespace
ESRI.ArcGIS.Geodatabase
Assembly
ESRI.Server.Geodatabase.dll

Provides access to members that control TIN selction methods.

[InterfaceType(ComInterfaceType.InterfaceIsIUnknown)]
[Guid("B0DBC8E2-B4B1-11D3-AB4D-0008C73FD50C")]
public interface ITinSelection

Properties

SelectedElementCount[esriTinElementType]

The number of selected elements.

int SelectedElementCount[esriTinElementType Type] { get; }

Parameters

Type esriTinElementType

Property Value

int

ClearSelection(esriTinElementType)

Clears selected element(s).

void ClearSelection(esriTinElementType Type)

Parameters

Type esriTinElementType

Examples

Sample Snippet

FlipSelection(esriTinElementType, bool)

Flips current selection of the specified element type in the TIN.

void FlipSelection(esriTinElementType Type, bool bDataElementsOnly)

Parameters

Type esriTinElementType
bDataElementsOnly bool

Examples

Sample Snippet

Returns an enumerator containing selected elements.

Returns TRUE if the element referenced by the index is selected.
